body: This includes a ClimaCore update that fixes some debug prints.
title: Up deps

body:
Currently, the model easily becomes unstable when the model top is high. Increasing vertical levels may help, but that makes the turnaround slow. This PR adds a command line argument `high_top` so that we can move forward while trying to fix this.

The default of high_top is false, and the model top will be 30km with 10 levels. When setting high_top to true, the model top will be 45km with 25 levels. We run one `sphere_held_suarez_rhoe_equilmoist_hightop` in ci just to make sure it runs, so no regression test is needed. We run two experimental long runs`longrun_hs_rhoe_hightop` and `longrun_hs_rhoe_equil_hightop`. It's ok if they fail, we'll keep looking at it.

Please let me know what you think!
title: add high_top command line argument

body:
~This PR centralizes the output folder for all jobs that use the driver (+ the TC example).~

I was thinking a bit about what I previously did (prepending `output/` for all jobs), and it was a bit more complicated than what I really wanted--which is to only do this locally. We always print the output folder to the log, so it should always be clear. I think this is actually a lot simpler, though. This will help users from having too cluttered package directories. I need to double check that `haskey(ENV, "CI")` works on buildkite, if so then I think this solution should be fine.

Closes #407.
title: Centralize output folder
